description: Local mandate gate and proof trail for AI agents that take consequential actions.
name: com.forgeorbital/agent-gate

environmentVariables.description: Forge decision-API key (starts with fi_). Set this or FORGE_BEARER_TOKEN.
environmentVariables.name: FORGE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Alternative to FORGE_API_KEY: a Forge bearer token for the decision API.
environmentVariables.name: FORGE_BEARER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Forge decision API. Defaults to the hosted Forge cloud.
environmentVariables.name: FORGE_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Tenant id stamped into every proof-trail record.
environmentVariables.name: FORGE_TENANT_ID

environmentVariables.description: required = fail-closed (block if Forge cannot record); best_effort = execute anyway.
environmentVariables.name: FORGE_RECORD_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the signed mandate (policy) JSON. Create it with `forge-agent-gate init`.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_GATE_MANDATE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: If this file exists, every gated write is hard-blocked (master kill switch).
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_GATE_KILL_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Kalshi API key id. Only for the live Kalshi venue adapter; stays on your machine.
environmentVariables.name: KALSHI_API_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: Path to your Kalshi RSA private key. Only for the Kalshi venue adapter.
environmentVariables.name: KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Kalshi environment: demo or prod. Only for the Kalshi venue adapter.
environmentVariables.name: KALSHI_ENV

packageArguments.description: Run the risk-control MCP gateway over stdio.
